sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me get current blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blocks = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
        center_c = (b[0][1] + b[2][1]) // 2
        blocks.append((center_r, center_c, n['color']))
blocks.sort()
print("After red click:")
for r, c, color in blocks:
    print("  (%d, %d): %s" % (r, c, color))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me track the pattern across all states. Let me build a complete history of block states.

# Let me collect all states from history
all_states = []
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    seg = h.frame.segmentation
    blocks = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['pixels'] == 16:
            b = n['boundary']
            center_r = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
            center_c = (b[0][1] + b[2][1]) // 2
            blocks[(center_r, center_c)] = n['color']
    all_states.append(blocks)

# Print all states
for i, state in enumerate(all_states):
    print("State %d:" % i)
    for key in sorted(state.keys()):
        print("  %s: %s" % (key, state[key])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Col 49: g, p, b, S, g
